Our Menu

Baked With Love,
Served With Pride

From our legendary Irani chai to freshly baked cakes — everything at Juno is made with heart and served fresh every day.

★ Bestseller

Signature Chai

Irani Dum Chai

Slow-brewed to perfection with Assam tea leaves and warm spices. The chai that highway travellers drive back for. Hands-down the best in Andhra Pradesh.

Juno Special Milk Cake

Egg Puff

₹30

Street Favourites

Fresh-baked, every morning
The best chai on the highway
1975 Est.

Our Story

Born on the Highway,
Loved Across Andhra

What began as a small bakery beside the NH-16 has grown into one of the most beloved pit-stops between Chennai and Hyderabad. Juno has been feeding hungry travellers, local families, and late-night drivers for over four decades — with the same warmth, freshness, and quality that started it all.

Our Irani Dum Chai is brewed the traditional way. Our buns are shaped by hand and baked fresh every morning. Our milk cake is a recipe passed down through generations. And our smiles? Those don't cost a thing.

50+
Years Baking
1,437
Google Reviews
4.1★
Average Rating
Read Full Story
The Craft

Baked with Honest Hands

Every item at Juno is crafted in our open kitchen — no shortcuts, no substitutes. Just flour, care, and fifty years of knowing exactly what the highway traveller needs.

"Their Irani dum chai hands down THE BEST. And also their buns — soft, fluffy and all you expect a cup to be. Don't miss this spot."

Siktha S. — Google Review

"The fried chicken pizza with extra cheese was amazing. Specifically the pizza — it's just too good! The staff were super friendly too."

"A perfect pit stop. Clean restrooms, bakery items, great tea. Milk Cake is a must — it just melts in the mouth."

"The shawarma was the best I ever had. Now a days Hyderabad even doesn't serve at this standard. Must recommend!"
